---
name: Loader or analysis notebook
description: Add a small consumer for the JSONL dataset
title: "Dataset consumer: <Python/DuckDB/Polars/JS/etc>"
labels: [dataset, docs, good-first-issue]
---

## Goal

Add a tiny downstream consumer that makes the dataset easier to use.

Examples:

- Python streaming loader
- DuckDB query recipe
- Polars notebook
- JS/TypeScript loader
- label distribution analysis
- prompt/style sampler

## Input

Use the prompt-only export unless you need full records:

- https://generatedgallery.com/index/generated-gallery.prompts.jsonl.gz
- https://generatedgallery.com/index/generated-gallery.jsonl.gz

## Output

- concise example code
- no secrets
- no paid APIs
- clear expected output
- note rights caveats if image URLs are touched
